commands.name: maestro
commands.description: Intelligent coordinator - analyze intent + read project state -> select optimal command chain -> execute via Skill()

commands.name: maestro-init
commands.description: Initialize project with auto state detection (empty/code/existing)

commands.name: maestro-plan
commands.description: Explore, clarify, plan, check, and confirm a phase execution plan

commands.name: maestro-execute
commands.description: Execute phase plan with wave-based parallel execution and atomic commits

commands.name: maestro-verify
commands.description: Goal-Backward verification with 3-layer must-have checks, anti-pattern scan, Nyquist test coverage validation

commands.name: maestro-brainstorm
commands.description: Unified brainstorming with dual-mode operation - auto pipeline and single role analysis

commands.name: maestro-analyze
commands.description: Multi-dimensional analysis with CLI exploration, decision extraction, and intent tracking

commands.name: maestro-quick
commands.description: Execute a quick task with workflow guarantees but skip optional agents

commands.name: maestro-spec-generate
commands.description: Generate specification package from idea/requirements through 7-phase document chain

commands.name: maestro-phase-add
commands.description: Add new phase to project roadmap

commands.name: maestro-milestone-audit
commands.description: Audit milestone completion against roadmap criteria

commands.name: maestro-roadmap
commands.description: Interactive roadmap creation with iterative refinement — lightweight alternative to spec-generate

commands.name: maestro-milestone-complete
commands.description: Mark milestone as complete with artifact validation

commands.name: spec-setup
commands.description: Initialize project specs from codebase scan

commands.name: spec-add
commands.description: Add knowledge entry to project specs

commands.name: spec-load
commands.description: Load specs by keyword search

commands.name: spec-map
commands.description: Scan and map codebase structure

commands.name: quality-test
commands.description: User Acceptance Testing with conversational protocol

commands.name: quality-debug
commands.description: Hypothesis-driven debugging with evidence logging

commands.name: quality-refactor
commands.description: Tech debt reflection iteration

commands.name: quality-sync
commands.description: Change-impact-doc synchronization pipeline

commands.name: quality-test-gen
commands.description: Generate tests to fill coverage gaps

commands.name: quality-integration-test
commands.description: Self-iterating integration test cycle

commands.name: manage-status
commands.description: Display project status dashboard and route to next action

commands.name: manage-memory
commands.description: Manage project memory (view, search, update)

commands.name: manage-memory-capture
commands.description: Capture working context to memory

commands.name: manage-codebase-rebuild
commands.description: Full codebase documentation index rebuild

commands.name: manage-codebase-refresh
commands.description: Incremental documentation refresh

commands.name: manage-issue
commands.description: Interactive issue management -- create, query, update, close, link, and discover issues
